title: campylanthus glaber subsp. spathulatus
intro: Campylanthus glaber subsp. spathulatus, a perennial herb of the family Plantaginaceae, is native to the Mediterranean region and is also known as the 'Mediterranean blue forget-me-not'. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential medicinal value. Studies have shown that Campylanthus glaber subsp. spathulatus may help alleviate various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
